label: The Ledgers' Store
description: The Ledgers' Store serves as the secured storage room of the Surveyor's Loft, enclosed by rough lath-and-plaster partitions braced with iron strapwork reclaimed from Cindervale’s bastions. Wall-niches and low shelving hold sealed folios, rolled plats, chain measures, and wax-stamped packets arranged under a strict clerical order. A heavy plank door bears a riveted hasp and soot-dark smears from frequent handling, while the air remains dry with lime dust and lamp-smoke. The floor is laid with mismatched boards over ancient stone, its gaps stuffed with tow to keep ash and grit from the records.
